headings.usage: Massive stats, hero text, section headers

monospace.usage: Metrics, codes, terminal outputs, tables, logs

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Repeating linear gradient CSS overlay (1px height, transparent to rgba(0,0,0,0.15))
visual_enhancers.terminal_elements: Blinking cursor (animate-pulse) next to active states, ASCII borders or subtle 1px green borders on active modules.

layouts.grid_system: Mode B: Control Room Grid. 12-column subgrid logic. Strict alignment, no floating objects. Every pixel accounted for.
layouts.cards: Flat background (bg-[#0A0A0A]), 1px solid border (#1F2937), rounded-none. Hover: border transitions to #39FF14/50.

animations.hover: Instant background color shift, slow border glow transition (transition-all duration-300 ease-out).
animations.terminal: Cursor blink (1s step-end infinite), number counter animations for large stats.

button.primary: bg-transparent border border-[#39FF14] text-[#39FF14] hover:bg-[#39FF14] hover:text-black hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.6)] font-mono rounded-none uppercase text-sm tracking-widest transition-all
button.secondary: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#1F2937] text-gray-300 hover:text-white hover:border-gray-500 font-mono rounded-none text-sm transition-all

components.input: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#1F2937] text-[#F3F4F6] focus:border-[#39FF14] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#39FF14] font-mono rounded-none placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-colors
components.card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#1F2937] rounded-none overflow-hidden relative. Include an optional 1px green top border for 'active' or 'running' states.
components.table: Dense padding (py-2 px-3). Header uses uppercase monospace (text-xs tracking-wider text-gray-400). Rows have hover state bg-[#111111].
components.chart: Recharts with neon green lines (#39FF14), black background, minimal axes (gray-800). Gradient fill under line (green to transparent). Disable cartesian grid or make it opacity 0.05.
components.badge: bg-[rgba(57,255,20,0.1)] border border-[#39FF14] text-[#39FF14] rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase

pages.Auth: Split screen layout. Left side: Terminal login form with 'root@resilience:~$' prompt aesthetic. Right side: Abstract green matrix background image with CSS scanlines overlay.
pages.Dashboard_Home: Bento grid of metrics. Massive IBM Plex Mono numbers for 'Total Tests Run' and 'Avg RPS'. Use Azeret Mono for the H1 page title.
pages.Project_Manager: CRUD list displaying user domains. Focus on monospace alignment for IPs, domains, and last test dates.
pages.Domain_Verification: Stepped flow. Copy-paste DNS TXT record component with a prominent 'click to copy' interaction. Terminal block design for the token.
pages.Test_Scenario_Builder: Multi-step or segmented control (Shadcn Tabs). Sliders for Target RPS. Monospace input for Endpoint Paths. High-tension 'DEPLOY TEST' primary CTA.
pages.Live_Test_Run_View: High-density control room. Real-time Recharts line chart spanning full width. Latency percentiles (p50/p95/p99) in tight 1-col widgets on the side.
pages.Test_History: Data table showing past runs. Status column uses Badges (Success=Green, Failed=Red, Stress=Amber).
pages.Test_Report: Detailed terminal-like log output. Hardening recommendations presented as 'System Diagnostics' in a preformatted `<pre>` style container.

images.description: Green digital matrix LED wall background

testing.data_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='run-test-cta'`, `data-testid='project-row-item'`). Convention: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts for Azeret Mono, Geist, and IBM Plex Mono. Import them in the root layout/CSS.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for an angular, professional geometry matching the terminal vibe.
Implement Shadcn UI using .js/.jsx (NO TypeScript). Ensure all components are modified to have sharp edges (`rounded-none`).
Add a fixed global CSS grain/scanline overlay to the application root to enforce the hacker aesthetic globally.
For all charts, use Shadcn/Recharts but strip out distracting grid lines. Use neon green (#39FF14) for primary data series with an area gradient.
Ensure 'dark' mode is forced permanently in Tailwind (e.g., set `<html className='dark'>`). Do not implement a light mode toggle.
Add blinking cursor animations (`animate-pulse bg-[#39FF14] w-2 h-4 inline-block align-middle ml-2`) next to active page titles to enhance the terminal feel.
